The cause is discussed as set forth in the transcript of the certified shorthand reporter. The Court confirms the tentative ruling with modification.

DEFENDANT BRANDY RODRIGUEZ'S MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-16-551128 WITH CASE CGC-15-546763 is GRANTED. The two cases have substantial overlap in the applicable facts and law and judicial economy is served by consolidating them. The two cases are consolidated for all purposes. Case 546763 is the lead case and all further filings in both cases will be in that case only. The May 15, 2017 trial date set in case 546763 now applies to both cases. This order is without prejudice to one or more of the parties seeking a continuance of the trial date based on good cause and/or to seek to consolidate these two cases with the Juvadi case (case 551847) and/or the trial judge making any appropriate rulings regarding severance, bifurcation or phasing of the cases. The May 15, 2017 trial date in CGC-16-551128 now applies in this action. Written order is signed and filed in open court.
